Hello Kamran,

Good Day!

We could not locate any store registered with us using the email id kamran@shifteq.com

Could you please share your store URL and the registered email id so that we can address your case further?

Additionally, please share more details about your case and if needed, we will be happy to setup a Zoom call to assist you further.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
